vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes: raise immediately (no cooldown) and auto-merge once CI is green

packageRules.description: Auto-merge patch and minor updates once they clear the 14-day cooldown and CI is green
Never auto-merge major updates - review and merge them myself
Stay on the pdf.js v3 line - v4+ is an ESM rewrite that needs a code migration, and cdnjs has no matching SRI digest for it (causes the lookup-failure warning)

customManagers.description: Keep the cdnjs-hosted PDF.js and SheetJS libraries (and their SRI hashes) up to date across index.html, app.js (worker), and sw.js (cache list) so versions never drift
